title: Multi-Agent Logistics Enhancement System for Efficient Consignment Delivery
description: Built a multi-agent logistics automation workflow using five specialized agents for consignment delivery management, leveraging RAG with FAISS for adaptive task-specific information retrieval and integrating external tools (e.g., Weather API via MCP) to incorporate real-time delivery insights and improve operational decision-making.
fullDescription: Developed a distributed multi-agent system coordinating logistics, weather data collection, routing, and operational adjustments dynamically. Built using FastAPI and FAISS for semantic search on operational directives, integrating the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for tool execution and live Weather API updates.
highlights: Coordinated 5 specialized agents under a centralized supervisor routing model
Achieved real-time operational decision-making incorporating changing atmospheric contexts
Used Model Context Protocol (MCP) to standardize external system actions

title: Large Language Model on custom fashion data using RAG and SQL Database
description: Engineered a custom LLM for plain-English SQL querying using ChromaDB for in-context retrieval, and integrated FAISS-based web-driven fashion trend analysis with performance evaluation using BLEU scores.
fullDescription: Engineered a custom LLM system for natural language query execution on a SQL relational database representing fashion catalogs. Leveraged ChromaDB for high-accuracy in-context retrieval and FAISS for trend analytics, and utilized BLEU scores to validate the natural language output performance.
highlights: Implemented plain-English to SQL conversion and querying pipeline
Integrated ChromaDB and FAISS for multi-index vector retrieval
Evaluated model output quality and translation accuracy using BLEU scores

title: Automobile Insights and Prediction System
description: Microsoft Engage Project - Developed a data analytics application for car price prediction using Linear Regression and implemented K-Means clustering for user segmentation and pattern analysis.
fullDescription: Developed a comprehensive data analytics and machine learning application for the automotive domain. Built pricing prediction engines using Linear Regression and integrated K-Means clustering algorithm to analyze market segments, user preferences, and purchasing patterns.
highlights: Engineered predictive model for vehicle pricing using Linear Regression
Segmented customer categories using K-Means clustering algorithms
Designed exploratory data visualization pipelines for market insights
